title: Chicago Food Allergy Friendly City Guide
content: Captured from the Spokin Chicago Food Allergy Friendly City Guide on 2026-06-28. Included restaurant and treat entries such as Summer House Santa Monica, Piccolo Sogno, Small Cheval, RPM Italian, Little Goat Diner, Uncle Julio’s Mexican From Scratch, Big Star, Gibsons Bar & Steakhouse, MAK Restaurant, 3 Arts Club Cafe, Dove’s Luncheonette, Wheat’s End Cafe, Parlor Pizza Bar, The Allis, Athenian Room, The Loyalist, Chicago Diner, Quartino Ristorante, Medici on 57th, Honey Butter Fried Chicken, Urbanbelly, Monteverde Restaurant & Pastificio, Split Rail, Ema, Antique Taco, Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams, Swirlz Cupcakes, defloured: A Gluten Free Bakery, Frío Gelato, West Town Bakery & Diner, Dinkel’s Bakery, Sprinkles Cupcakes, Scoops Ice Cream, Do-Rite Donuts, and Scone City. Hotels were omitted from synthesis.
